text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... There has to be something I can do to
make feng shui not seem so foreign.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Every day, I get people telling me it's just a bunch
of baloney. But actually, there's a lot of evidence
behind it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If I want to get people like that interested, I
guess my best bet would be... the mere-exposure
effect!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I know, I'll ask Air Groove if we can hang trigram
charts in the bathrooms!
